release_goal: Manifest-category installer/build duplication (skills/hooks/agents wired 3x each across build-release.mjs, dogfood.mjs, install.sh, install.ps1) collapses to one reusable pattern per file, with zero change to installed output.
release_exit_criteria: npm run pilot PASS: local-zip install produces byte-identical installed tree (skills/, hooks incl. scope routing + chmod +x, agents/ with .md suffix) to pre-refactor
npm run release + npm run dogfood produce identical dist/release.zip contents and .claude/ mirror to pre-refactor (diff -r against a captured baseline)
Adding a hypothetical 4th manifest category requires editing exactly one call site per file, not a new copy-pasted loop

epics.title: Deduplicate manifest-category loops across build-release.mjs, dogfood.mjs, install.sh, install.ps1
epics.notes: Installer-critical-path refactor. Regression harness: npm run pilot, node scripts/verify-install.mjs, npm run release, npm run dogfood -- all byte/behavior verified against a pre-refactor baseline.
